summary: Execute immediate RRA follow-up to book a 30-minute discovery/demo this week and log outcomes.
reasoning: Highest-impact overdue sales action; agents are idle; prior plan exists but is not yet executed/logged—act now to drive revenue and clear backlog.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call now and email to book 30-minute discovery/demo this week
task.description:
1) Review CRM/account notes and last correspondence; verify primary and alternate contacts.
2) Call the primary contact now; if unavailable, attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard within 10 minutes.
3) Send a concise follow-up email proposing three time slots within the next 3 business days.
4) On contact, confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance requirements; offer a one-pager and a relevant case study.
5) Log all attempts and outcomes in the CRM; either book the meeting or schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted.
6) If contact details are stale/incorrect, escalate immediately for correction.
7) Complete initial outreach and CRM logging within 2 hours and post a brief summary update upon completion.
